default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Sync between Marcel and Molly to discuss team growth, operational improvements, and hiring strategies for fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital hitting milestone: \~12-13 clients, team of 12-13 people](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Key challenge: scaling Jimmy's role (account management/leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Focus on improving processes, automation, and creative capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Shift towards targeted hiring for specialized roles (e.g., technical, creative)](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

## Topics

### Team Growth and Scaling

  - [Current team size: 12-13 people managing 12-13 client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Main bottleneck: scaling Jimmy's role in account management](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Potential solutions:](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Develop high-potential new hires into Jimmy-like roles](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Hire fractional workers with more experience](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Recruit a US-based experienced hire in 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

### Process Improvement and Automation

  - [Marcel not spending enough time on improving processes](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Need for dedicated focus on developing V2 workflows](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Rare skill set required: improvement + execution capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Strategy: "spear fishing" and networking vs. broad job postings](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### Onboarding and Documentation

  - [Implement Hashicorp-style onboarding doc ownership](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Everyone should be a "bar raiser" and contribute to process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Molly to work with Demetrius on streamlining/documenting onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### Hiring Strategy

  - [Shift focus to candidates with complementary skills:](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [Content marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [Newsletter experience](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [Automation/prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [Low-code/no-code tool experience](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Consider hiring someone with engineering background for technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Explore creative talent acquisition (e.g., Upwork, contract-to-hire)](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [Jimmy to be added as manager for new hires in Remote](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Switched to contractor status for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Considering $100/month contractor coverage for legal protection](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Negotiated potential employee rate down from $600 to \~$380/month](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Payment Process Challenges

  - [Current process for paying contractors through Remote is manual and time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Need to streamline payment schedules and processes](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Molly to investigate options for more efficient payment methods](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to set up meeting with Jimmy to discuss scaling his role](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Molly to work on documenting and streamlining onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Explore hiring for specialized roles (technical, creative)](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Molly to add Jimmy as manager for new hires in Remote](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Investigate options to streamline contractor payment process](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Marcel to be signatory on future contracts](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Molly to reach out to Remote about payment scheduling and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/BPhCQjNv_PbC8LzNasaa5-rTEyWxzYDh?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

action_items.description: Add Jimmy as manager for new hires in Remote and give him full access to manage their profiles and data
Contact Remote to discuss streamlining the contractor payment process, setting up scheduled payments on the 1st of each month, and determining how contractor invoices will be calculated
Reschedule interview with Jimmy, Demetrius and Alice that was previously cancelled
